{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Chainkeeper madra
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] was tethered to the deck with [[Chainkeeper madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] is tied to the deck by strands of her [[Chainkeeper madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
